heading: Short title
label: 77a Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Securities Act of 1933”.
notes: Short Title of 2012 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 112–142, § 1126 Stat. 989July 9, 2012“This Act [amending ] may be cited as the ‘Church Plan Investment Clarification Act’.”section 77c of this title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 112–106, title III, § 301126 Stat. 315Apr. 5, 2012“This title [enacting , amending sections 77d, 77r, 78c, 78, and 78 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 77d, 77r, 78c, and 78 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Capital Raising Online While Deterring Fraud and Unethical Non-Disclosure Act of 2012’ or the ‘CROWDFUND Act’.”section 77d–1 of this titlelol

Short Title of 1980 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 96–477, title VI, § 60194 Stat. 2294Oct. 21, 1980“This title [amending sections 77b and 77d of this title] may be cited as the ‘Small Business Issuers’ Simplification Act of 1980’.”
